depression.description: I feel so anxious about family gatherings like my cousin's wedding. I can't shake the thought that everyone will judge me, just like my mother does.
When I miss my alarm and wake up late, I can't help but think that I can't do anything right. It makes me feel like giving up completely.
Every time something goes wrong, like the rain ruining my plans, I feel like I'm just a victim of bad luck. It makes me angry and ashamed.
I often feel like I'm not good at handling stress, which leads me to avoid situations that could be stressful. But then I end up feeling isolated and alone.

Delusion.description: I believe that if I show my true self to my family, they will reject me just like my mother did. This fear keeps me from being open with them.
I often think that I'm unlovable and that nobody really wants me around. This belief makes it hard for me to connect with others.

psychosis.description: I often feel like I'm trapped and out of control in my life. It seems like no matter what I do, I can't change my situation.
I find myself turning to alcohol when I'm feeling overwhelmed. It's like a way to escape my feelings, but I know it's not a healthy choice.
